text.title: GraphQL API Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the use case multi-client with nested reads or single-client CRUD?

conclusion.verdict: use REST; GraphQL overhead not paid back
design subgraph SDL, run rover subgraph check before merge

text.example: Need: dashboard with org/user/orders, web+mobile clients. → New GraphQL service. → Design SDL with Relay pagination on orders. → Add OrganizationLoader and OrdersByUserLoader, per-request in context. → permission_classes=[IsOrgMember] on every org-scoped resolver. → QueryDepthLimiter(10) + QueryComplexityExtension(200).
